description_long: This is a vibrant athletic running shoe featuring a predominantly orange mesh upper with synthetic overlays for structure and durability. The shoe has a maroon padded collar and heel area, providing comfort and support around the ankle. Distinctive white branding and logo elements are visible on the tongue, side, and heel, adding a modern and sporty touch. The midsole is equipped with a unique segmented cushioning system in white and orange, designed for shock absorption and energy return. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with orange laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. Reflective accents on the heel and side enhance visibility in low-light urban environments.
description: A bright orange and maroon athletic running shoe with white branding, a segmented cushioned sole, and reflective accents. The shoe features a breathable mesh upper and a standard criss-cross lacing system.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange mesh toe box, white branding on the tongue, and the criss-cross lacing system.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the maroon collar, side logo, and the segmented white and orange sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the maroon heel with reflective stripes and a circular logo, as well as the heel structure.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the side logo, mesh texture, and the unique sole design with visible cushioning pods.
attribute_logo: Circular 'On' logo on the heel and side in gray/white; stylized 'On' text on the tongue in white.
